judgements.reason: Reasoning (Apr 19-27 6-CVE inference-server + agentic-CI sequence including unpatched SGLang SSTI precondition, NIST + Google indirect-prompt-injection rise precondition, dedicated CISA/NVD sub-catalog + SBOM tagging + OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 Loader-RCE top-3 consequence, Q4 2026 landing) holds. May 1 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authorization is the strongest institutional confirmation; SGLang patch May 5 closes the case but doesn't unwind the cohort framing.

Eight bridges Apr 28 - May 5 stack supporting evidence at rel=3-5 across because/given dimensions, including the canonical CSAI MITRE-CNA institutional confirmation. No contradicts; the May 5 rel=3 dim=because (SGLang patch + ~7,000 AI-infra-tagged CVE backlog) is supportive context for the sub-catalog argument.

Three Needs (CISA/NIST AI-vulnerability program manager scoping the sub-catalog; OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 editor on Loader-RCE top-3 promotion; supply-chain SBOM signature-feed product leads at Snyk/Wiz/Pillar/Lasso/Lakera) all status=open. Seven chain edges and six relations cohere. Entails relation with 678c96be (Q3 AI-Infra CVE-tag step) is the correct upstream framing; parallel relations with 5094f95c, 082b0a07, 4ecb84808 are all logically aligned. No upstream contradicted; no equivalents requiring evidence reflow.
